title: notodanthonia carphoides
intro: Notodanthonia carphoides, also known as the Carphoid Notodanthonia, is a plant species in the family Poaceae, commonly found in New Zealand. It is used in traditional Maori medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Notodanthonia carphoides include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. Notodanthonia carphoides is typically prepared for medicinal use through various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and poultices.
